title: Kingdom
overview: Shomrat is a local gangster, who works only with his three friends, and charges anyone doing business in his area. He gets in a fight with a bigger gangster in the city when he prevents them from charging for businesses in his area. In an ensuring shootout, Shomrat kills his all men and gets him arrested.
